arts.ttl: Barcelona, PSG Target Nears Exit With Arsenal Unwilling to Meet Wage Demands
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have plenty of midfield talent, but they’re definitely lacking in size. Fabian Ruiz stands out as the tallest at 6-foot-2 (1.89m), and there’s a clear drop-off after that. Senny Mayulu brings some height at 6 feet (1.83m), but beyond the 18-year-old, the depth isn’t quite there. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain had their eye on Dean Huijsen last summer as part of a defensive overhaul, but the Spanish center-back ended up joining AFC Bournemouth instead. If PSG revisits that interest, they’ll be facing some serious competition.
